red_test: go test ./internal/atlas -run 'TestRecommendationDerivedReadbackSchemasRequireCheckpointFreshnessStatus|TestMissionRecommendationsImportPersistsLeaseStartAndResumeUsesIt|TestMissionRecommendationsDetectStaleClosureArtifacts|TestRecommendationExecutionReadbackRejectsFalseCompletedNodes' -count=1 failed before model updates because derived readback structs had no checkpoint_freshness_status fields.
summary: Regression coverage now proves derived schemas require checkpoint_freshness_status and stale execution or closure artifacts are rejected when checkpoint freshness drifts from the root readback.
